Table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE

Card of table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE

Name

RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE

Code

RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURES

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT distinct

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE AS COUNTRY_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE AS PRODUCT_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_CODE AS FEATURE_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_LOCALIZEDVALUES_EN_UNIT AS FEATURE_LOCALIZED_VALUE_UNIT,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_LOCALIZEDVALUES_EN_VALUE AS FEATURE_LOCALIZED_VALUE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_NAME_EN AS FEATURE_NAME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_UNLOCALIZEDVALUES_UNIT AS FEATURE_UNLOCALIZED_VALUE_UNIT,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_UNLOCALIZEDVALUES_VALUE AS FEATURE_UNLOCALIZED_VALUE,

__LOAD_TS AS VALID_FROM

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURES

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,EVENTS_PRODUCTS_FEATURES_CODE

Primary key(s) Target: COUNTRY_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_CODE_BK, FEATURE_CODE_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

based on COUNTRY_CODE_BK (events_country_code)

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE

CKT_RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG


Server validation rule of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE

%RULES%


Code preview of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE

drop table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE (
PRODUCT_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
FEATURE_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
FEATURE_LOCALIZED_VALUE TEXT,
FEATURE_LOCALIZED_VALUE_UNIT TEXT,
FEATURE_NAME TEXT,
FEATURE_UNLOCALIZED_VALUE_UNIT TEXT,
FEATURE_UNLOCALIZED_VALUE TEXT,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_ primary key (COUNTRY_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_CODE_BK, FEATURE_CODE_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE set comment = 'Reference data entity capturing the features assigned to a product, including feature codes, feature names, and localized or unlocalized values describing extended technical or commercial product characteristics.';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE.PRODUCT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the product (events_products_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE.FEATURE_CODE_BK is
'Feature Code (events_products_features_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE.COUNTRY_CODE_BK is
'Country where the product is available (events_country_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE.FEATURE_LOCALIZED_VALUE is
'Feature Localized Value (EN) (events_products_features_localizedValues_en_value )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE.FEATURE_LOCALIZED_VALUE_UNIT is
'Feature Localized Value Unit (EN) (events_products_features_localizedValues_en_unit )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE.FEATURE_NAME is
'Feature Name (EN) (events_products_features_name_en )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE.FEATURE_UNLOCALIZED_VALUE_UNIT is
'Feature Unlocalized Value Unit (events_products_features_unLocalizedValues_unit )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE.FEATURE_UNLOCALIZED_VALUE is
'Feature Unlocalized Value (events_products_features_unLocalizedValues_value )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active (VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active (VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31)';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the record is active (ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.)';

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE

VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS.

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE

VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_FEATURE

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.
